Bracebridge, ON · MTO Certified · All Makes & Models

MUSKOKA'S
TRUSTED
MECHANIC.

No surprises. No runaround. Just honest repairs, transparent pricing, and your keys back in hand — every time.

Loaner Cars
FULL AUTO REPAIRS·SAFETY INSPECTIONS·WHEEL ALIGNMENTS·BRAKE SERVICE·ENGINE DIAGNOSTICS·LOANER VEHICLES·ALL MAKES & MODELS·MTO CERTIFIED·FULL AUTO REPAIRS·SAFETY INSPECTIONS·WHEEL ALIGNMENTS·BRAKE SERVICE·ENGINE DIAGNOSTICS·LOANER VEHICLES·ALL MAKES & MODELS·MTO CERTIFIED·

Who We Are

We've built our reputation one honest repair at a time. Families and cottagers across Muskoka trust us with their vehicles. Some drive 40+ minutes — just to see Bradley, Christy, and the team.

“Honest, reliable, automotive service you can trust.”

What We Do

01
Full Auto Repairs

All makes and models of private passenger and light commercial vehicles. From minor fixes to major overhauls — we handle it all under one roof.

02
Safety Inspections

Official Ontario MTO safety inspections performed on-site. Get your vehicle certified quickly and confidently by our qualified technicians.

03
Wheel Alignments

Precision wheel alignments to extend tire life and improve handling. We set your vehicle straight so you drive straight — every kilometre.

04
Brake Service

Full brake inspections, pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, and caliper service. We make sure you can stop safely — every single time.

05
Engine Diagnostics

Modern diagnostic equipment to accurately pinpoint issues. We find the real problem — not just the symptom — and fix it right the first time.

06
Loaner Vehicles

Need to keep moving while your car is in the shop? Loaner vehicles are available upon request — just mention it when you call to book.

Full Service Menu

FULL AUTO REPAIRSAll makes & models
SAFETY INSPECTIONSOntario MTO certified
WHEEL ALIGNMENTS4-wheel precision
BRAKE SERVICEInspection to replacement
ENGINE DIAGNOSTICSModern equipment
LOANER VEHICLESAvailable on request
LIGHT COMMERCIAL VEHICLESPrivate & commercial

Total Reviews

Why JL Car Care

THE
RIGHT
SHOP.

JL Car Care offers full automotive repairs to all makes and models of private passenger and light commercial vehicles. Locally owned and operated in the heart of Muskoka, we're committed to honest, reliable service you can count on — every visit.

Bradley & Christy Loshaw, Owners.
Bracebridge, Ontario.

Located behind Bracebridge Propane —
in the same building as Jiffy Lube.

All Makes & Models

We service all private passenger and light commercial vehicles — domestic and foreign, new and old. Whatever you drive, Brad and the team have you covered.

Transparent Pricing

You get a clear estimate before any work begins. No hidden fees, no surprise charges. We communicate every step of the way — what we quote is what you pay.

Loaner Vehicles Available

Keep your day moving while your car is in the shop. Loaner vehicles are available upon request — just let us know when you book and we'll have one ready.

MTO Safety Certified

We conduct official Ontario MTO safety inspections right here at our shop. Get your vehicle certified by our qualified technicians with confidence.

Customer Reviews

Google 4.9★ · 42 reviews·Facebook 5.0★ · 10 reviews·YellowPages 5.0★

“JL Car Care is one of the best run businesses of any kind I know of. Their service is always above and beyond, prices are affordable and transparent. We bring our car from 40 minutes away — wouldn't trust it with anyone else.”

Google Review
Muskoka Region

LET'S GET
YOU MOVING

Call us, email us, walk in, or message us on Facebook. We're ready when you are.

Mon–Fri 8am–5pm · Sat & Sun Closed
